name: Oysters Fitzpatrick
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the dried out oyster shells thoroughly with one clove of minced garlic.
2. Place a drop of hot sauce in each shell.
3. Add 1 large or 2 small oysters to each prepared shell.
4. Top each oyster with a 1-inch piece of bacon, and add a dash of catsup.
5. Broil for 15 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit in the oven.
Serves 2, using 1 dozen oysters per person.
